zh-HK: Similar Product Quick Add 智能識別升級：80% firm threshold，候選會完整列出供確認
混合中英 token pool 與資料化 alias table，改善 Lavazza、Vitasoy、Watsons 等相似產品配對
尺寸／容量／包裝獨立判斷，不同規格會顯示 warning 並預設不勾選
候選描述改為中英分行顯示，提升 Quick Add 檢查可讀性
Product Group Preview 補上描述相似度 fallback，支援以關鍵字補齊顏色／規格群組
en: Similar Product Quick Add matching now uses an 80% firm threshold and lists all candidates for review
Mixed Chinese/English token pooling and data-driven aliases improve Lavazza, Vitasoy, Watsons matching
Size, volume, and pack differences are detected separately with warnings and unchecked defaults
Candidate descriptions now split English and Chinese onto separate lines for easier review
Product Group Preview adds the same description-similarity fallback for color/spec group recovery
